---
title: "Sanger Institute"
description: "Wellcome Sanger Institute"
date: "2022-08-08"
categories: [Training]
---

<!-- ![](featured.png) -->

- Next generation sequencing (NGS) and analysis of bacterial genomes,NGS data quality control, assembly, reference mapping, in silico isolate
characterisation, developing a portable bioinformatics pipeline, and downstream analyses such as phylogenetic inference
- Recipient of the scholarship, Wellcome Sanger Institute ‑ Pathogen Genomics (GPS and JUNO projects), Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation
